details: The package presents itself as a TypeScript form-utility library but ships lib/perf.js, which combines os/child_process/https primitives in the classic system-info exfiltration shape: imports os, http, https, and child_process; calls os.hostname() in multiple locations; runs execSync to capture command output; and issues HTTPS POST requests to a hardcoded hostname carrying that data. The presence of curl invocation and a https.request POST to a fixed hostname inside a file unrelated to the advertised form-utility purpose is consistent with host-info / command-output exfiltration on load or on use. Installing or requiring this package exposes the installer's host identity and command output to an external endpoint with no documented purpose.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
